# CTOS Portfolio Roadmap
# 04 — Experience Layer (RMD v2.0)

## Objective

Transform the portfolio from a collection of pages into a memorable, recruiter-first digital experience.

This layer defines:

- User Journey Architecture
- Navigation Psychology
- Information Density Strategy
- Conversion Flow Design
- Scroll Storytelling Rules
- Trust Signal Placement
- Micro Interaction Placement
- Mobile Experience Standards
- Accessibility Experience Standards

---

# Experience Vision

The experience should feel like:

A modern operating system for a Digital Systems Architect.

Not a blog.
Not a template.
Not a generic developer portfolio.

---

# Core Experience Principles

## Principle 01

Clarity Before Complexity

## Principle 02

Architecture Before Technology

## Principle 03

Trust Before Conversion

## Principle 04

Experience Before Animation

## Principle 05

Motion Supports Understanding

---

# Success Criteria

Users should understand within 15 seconds:

1. Who you are
2. What you do
3. Why you are different
4. What systems you have built
5. How to contact you

---

# User Archetypes

## Recruiter

Goals:
- Evaluate capability
- Download resume
- Contact quickly

Pain Points:
- Too much technical detail
- Hard to find resume

Priority: Highest

---

## Founder

Goals:
- Evaluate system thinking
- Review outcomes
- Assess credibility

Priority: High

---

## Developer

Goals:
- Explore architecture
- Explore implementation
- Explore notes

Priority: Medium

---

## AI Enthusiast

Goals:
- Explore workflows
- Explore automation
- Explore systems

Priority: Medium

---

# Recruiter Journey

Landing
↓
Hero
↓
Proof Signals
↓
Featured Case Study
↓
Projects
↓
Resume
↓
Contact

Target Completion:
3–5 Minutes

---

# Founder Journey

Landing
↓
Hero
↓
Architecture Philosophy
↓
Flagship Project
↓
Case Studies
↓
Contact

Target Completion:
5–10 Minutes

---

# Developer Journey

Landing
↓
Projects
↓
Case Studies
↓
Technical Notes
↓
GitHub

Target Completion:
10–20 Minutes

---

# Homepage Experience Architecture

Section 01
Hero

Purpose:
Identity + Positioning

---

Section 02
Proof Signals

Purpose:
Immediate Credibility

---

Section 03
System Overview

Purpose:
Explain Expertise Areas

---

Section 04
Featured Case Study

Purpose:
Show Real Delivery Capability

---

Section 05
Selected Projects

Purpose:
Show Breadth

---

Section 06
Architecture Philosophy

Purpose:
Show Thinking Process

---

Section 07
Technical Notes

Purpose:
Build Authority

---

Section 08
Certificate Vault Preview

Purpose:
Supporting Evidence

---

Section 09
Contact Layer

Purpose:
Conversion

---

Section 10
Visitor Globe

Purpose:
Trust Signal

---

# Information Density Strategy

Hero = Low

Projects = Medium

Case Studies = High

Notes = Medium

Resume = Medium

---

# Navigation Psychology

Goals:

Reduce Cognitive Load

Encourage Exploration

Provide Fast Escape Routes

---

Desktop Navigation

Home
Projects
Case Studies
Resume
Notes
Contact

---

Utility Actions

Theme
Language
Command Palette

---

# Command Palette UX

Shortcut

CTRL + K
CMD + K

---

Functions

Search Projects
Search Notes
Navigate Pages
Theme Switch
Language Switch
Resume Access
Contact Access

---

# Search Experience

Search Sources

Projects
Case Studies
Notes
Certificates

---

Target Response

Under 100ms

---

# CTA Strategy

Primary CTA

Explore Projects

---

Secondary CTA

View Case Studies

---

Tertiary CTA

Contact

---

# Trust Signal Placement

Hero

Proof Signals

Featured Case Study

Resume Preview

Certificate Preview

Visitor Globe

---

# Scroll Storytelling

Allowed Areas

Case Studies
Architecture Sections
Flagship Projects

---

Forbidden Areas

Contact Forms
Resume Content
Long Articles

---

# Certificate Vault UX

Default State

Grid View

---

Hover State

Preview Certificate

---

Click State

Fullscreen Modal

---

Metadata

Issuer
Date
Skills
Verification Link

---

# Visitor Globe UX

Purpose:
Trust Signal

---

Placement:
Near Footer

---

Never Above Fold

---

# Contact Experience

Primary Channels

LinkedIn
Email
GitHub

---

Goals

Reduce Friction

Increase Professional Conversion

---

# Mobile Experience Rules

One-Hand Reachability

Bottom Navigation Priority

Reduced Motion

Fast Loading

Touch Friendly Targets

---

# Accessibility Experience Rules

Keyboard Navigation

Focus Visibility

Screen Reader Support

Reduced Motion Support

Color Contrast Compliance

---

# Micro Interaction Placement Matrix

Hero
- Node Hover
- Signal Pulse
- Metadata Reveal

Projects
- Card Tilt
- Card Glow
- Metadata Reveal

Certificates
- Folder Open
- Preview Expand

Navigation
- Hide
- Reveal
- Magnetic CTA

---

# Conversion Goals

Resume Download

Contact Click

GitHub Visit

Case Study Read

LinkedIn Visit

---

# Experience KPIs

Positioning Understanding <15s

Project Discovery <60s

Resume Reachability <2 Clicks

Contact Reachability <3 Clicks

Case Study Discovery <2 Scrolls

---

# AI Agent Rules

Rule EX-01
Prioritize clarity.

Rule EX-02
Guide attention intentionally.

Rule EX-03
Do not overwhelm users.

Rule EX-04
Every interaction must support understanding.

Rule EX-05
Recruiter journey has highest priority.

Rule EX-06
Experience before animation.

Rule EX-07
Trust before conversion.

---

# Definition of Done

- User journeys finalized.
- Homepage experience finalized.
- Navigation psychology implemented.
- Search UX implemented.
- Command palette UX implemented.
- CTA strategy implemented.
- Certificate vault UX implemented.
- Visitor globe UX implemented.
- Mobile UX validated.
- Accessibility UX validated.
- Experience KPIs measurable.

---

# Next Layer

05-motion-layer.rmd
